description_long: This is a tall, tapered cardboard box of Barry Callebaut Milk Chocolate Chunks, designed for baking and snacking. The front face features a large, bold product name in brown and red, with images of chocolate chunks and cookies to visually communicate its contents and intended use. The side panels provide detailed product information, including a description of the chocolate, its artisanal qualities, and a list of ingredients. The packaging is primarily off-white with brown and red accents, and includes recycling symbols and certifications. The top of the box is triangular, suggesting a foldable or tuck-in closure. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and designed to appeal to consumers seeking premium baking ingredients.
description: A tall, tapered cardboard box of Barry Callebaut Milk Chocolate Chunks with bold branding and cookie imagery, designed for baking and snacking.
description_view_0: Side view showing detailed product description, a cookie image, and part of the triangular top closure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Barry Callebaut logo, large product name, chocolate chunk and cookie images, and key product highlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional product information, a cookie image, and recycling symbols near the base.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a close-up of chocolate chunks, a full ingredients list, and certification details.
attribute_brand_logo: The Barry Callebaut logo is visible on the front face, located at the top, featuring a red rectangular background with white and brown text.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front face clearly indicates 'Milk Chocolate Chunks' with images of chocolate chunks and cookies, suggesting a milk chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Ingredients and certification information are visible on the rear and side panels, including a full ingredients list and chocolate certification details.
